steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: The blank fills "The ______ public art on display in the city can satisfy any art lover." The passage lists art ranging from monumental mosaics to innovative street murals — the blank must mean the wide range or variety.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The [phrase] needs to capture that Chicago's public art spans many styles and scales. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — breadth of: wide scope, variety — the "breadth of" public art captures the range from Chagall mosaics to street murals, satisfying any art lover. ✓
  • Choice B — controversy over: dispute or disagreement — the passage praises the collection, not debates it; no conflict is mentioned. ✗
  • Choice C — confusion about: lack of clarity — the passage presents the art positively and clearly; no confusion is implied. ✗
  • Choice D — apathy toward: lack of interest — contradicts the claim that it "can satisfy any art lover." ✗
That confirms A is correct.
